sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, value Float64, created_at DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'Alpha', 3.14, now()), (2, NULL, NULL, now()), (3, 'Beta', 2.71, now());

SELECT concat('ID: ', toString(id), ', Name: ', concat(name, ' – Value: ', CAST(value AS String))) AS detailed_info FROM test_table WHERE id GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL);
SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT concat(name, '_suffix') AS name FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY) GROUP BY name HAVING count > 0;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (val Int32, status String, reference Int32, UNIQUE (val));
SELECT concat(status, ' ID: ', toString(val)) AS status_info FROM secondary_table WHERE reference GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT id FROM test_table);
SELECT id, MAX(value) AS max_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING concat('Max for ', toString(id), ' is ', toString(max_value)) IS NOT NULL;

SELECT id, NULLIF(concat('Value: ', toString(value)), 'Value: ') AS formatted_value FROM test_table WHERE formatted_value GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT concat('Value: ', toString(value)) FROM test_table WHERE name IS NULL);
